b03Source.labelOrigin: K36-B1A series (B1A1, B1A2, B1A3, B1A5, B1A6, B1A6B, B1A7) used 'WorkTime B-03' as a meta-label to flag 'WorkTime score contract is outside this stage's scope'. Not a numbered K26-J finding.
b03Source.k26JAuditFindingIds: K26-J audit uses unnumbered risks 1-10 (3 HIGH / 4 MEDIUM / 2 LOW / 2 INFO). The 'B-03' label is NOT in K26-J audit's numbered list.
b03Source.riskSubstance: WorkTime-aware SC3 / SC7 alignment, preview/apply/rollback snapshot stability, solver candidate generation from snapshot, full/delta score consistency, K22 baseline preservation
b03Source.relationToK26J: K26-J (commits 5bd779a/9862278/985528b/a62c36a/ead6bba/b954ab7/bf92f3d/52f200d) is the dedicated stage that addresses all B-03 substance. K26-J was CLOSED before the B-03 label appeared in K36-B1A docs.

k26JEvidenceChain.item: K26-J audit covers all 3 HIGH WorkTime gaps
K26-J3 solver candidate generation from snapshot
K26-J4 SC3 / SC7 score WorkTimeForScore alignment

verificationAtFc76e5e.head: fc76e5e
verificationAtFc76e5e.build: Compiled successfully (1 pre-existing Turbopack NFT warning, unchanged)

conclusion.evidenceSummary: K26-J closeout (52f200d) explicitly marked workTimeSolverScoreIntegrationStatus=CLOSED before the K36-B1A series created the B-03 label. The B-03 label is a K36-B1A meta-label indicating 'WorkTime score contract is outside this stage's scope', not a numbered K26-J finding. All K26-J sub-stage verify scripts continue to PASS at fc76e5e, including the k22ExpectedChanged=false invariant. The K22-C 73/0/0/0 baseline remains intact, confirming that the WorkTime-aware score changes did not break the K22 expected outputs (which is risk #6 in K26-J audit, marked HIGH).
